## Summary

Describe the research change and why it is needed.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Research brief
- [ ] Working paper
- [ ] Evidence table
- [ ] Bibliography
- [ ] Framework crosswalk
- [ ] Review packet
- [ ] Methods or source-quality guidance
- [ ] Issue/PR templates

## Review Notes

- Research question:
- Sources or registry/export IDs:
- Claim-to-source trace:
- Limitations:
- Related standards, data, governance, or website impact:

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No credentials or private connection strings are included.
- [ ] No private student data, confidential partner documents, or private contact lists are included.
- [ ] Claims are source-traced or clearly marked as draft interpretation.
- [ ] Limitations and uncertainty are included.
- [ ] Language avoids product, provider, school, or platform endorsement.
